message:
wip: Start porting rs-bpe backtracking encoder (broken)

Add backtrack_encoder.zig with rs-bpe's greedy+backtrack algorithm

Status:
- Algorithm structure ported from ../../../rs-bpe/bpe/src/backtrack_encoder.rs
- Compiles successfully
- Only 0.8% correct (589/594 tests fail)
- Produces minimal output (e.g. just [13] instead of 20 tokens)

Implementation:
- Greedy forward: try longest token match
- Backtracking: try shorter prefix or pop last token
- BitField for tracking positions
- Based on rs-bpe's O(n) algorithm

Issues to fix:
- Main encode loop exits too early
- next_token state management incorrect
- Backtracking logic needs debugging

Next: Debug the encode loop to match Rust step() function behavior
